name: ExtensionEncounterHistory_Encounter
title: R5: The Encounter associated with this set of historic values (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EncounterHistory.encounter` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EncounterHistory.encounter` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EncounterHistory.encounter` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Encounter)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EncounterHistory.encounter` has a context of Encounter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Encounter`.
Element `EncounterHistory.encounter` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: The Encounter associated with this set of historic values (new)
element.comment:
Element `EncounterHistory.encounter` has a context of Encounter based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `Encounter`.
Element `EncounterHistory.encounter` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
This is also used for associating a child's encounter back to the mother's encounter.Refer to the Notes section in the Patient resource for further details.
